en: That is so badass.
Oh, sorry, is it okay if we swear in front of you?
ko: 아, 미안, 너 앞에서 욕해도 괜찮아?

en: Of course you effing can. I've heard it all.
Anyway, I'm here if you guys have questions.
Sorry, not if, when.
Hey, hon, hope your study group's going okay.
ko: 이봐, 자기야, 스터디 그룹 잘 되고 있길 바래.

en: I brought your lunch. Heather!
Get out of here, Heather! Okay!
I don't need that! I have a meal plan, Heather!
ko: 그거 필요 없어! 나 식단이 있어, 헤더!

en: Okay, hon. Heather, go!
Don't embarrass me, Heather! You can't ask me that!
ko: 나를 창피하게 하지 마, 헤더! 그걸 물어볼 수 없어!

en: What's in it? A Cressible!
Paper strawberry! Both!
Leave it! Okay!
So, where are we going for spring break?
Simon, are you okay? Yeah, defo.
If we do Miami, we can get there by train.
ko: 마이애미로 가면 기차로 갈 수 있어.

en: Um, was that your mom?
What?
No, that'd be weird. I'm just like you guys.
ko: 아니, 그건 이상해. 나도 너희랑 같아.

en: I live in the dorms, I have a roommate,
I shower in my shoes, my balls are happening.
ko: 신발 신고 샤워하고, 내 일이 벌어지고 있어.

en: Oh, um, wait, who's your roommate?
ko: 아, 음, 잠깐, 너의 룸메이트는 누구야?

en: This random older woman they paired me with.
ko: 나랑 짝지어진 랜덤한 나이 많은 여자야.

en: Is it your mom?
I don't think so.
